friendly_name: Excise Doctrine Curation and Inline References
source_description: Phase 1 tranche of EPIC #461 (Charter as Synthesis & Doctrine Reference Graph). Tracked by issue #463. Excise the legacy doctrine curation pipeline and inline reference fields (no fallback, no backwards compatibility) and make build_context_v2() the sole context builder. Uses the #393 bulk-edit guardrail (explicit occurrence classification, category-aware include/exclude rules, mission-level occurrence map, verification-by-completeness).
